The '''Buzz Boys''' were a team of eight [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] working with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. They were one of the Alliance teams sent to [[Mission to Goratak III|retrieve]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that had ejected from a [[Tech 4 PDV]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goratak III]]. They were each armed with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], and the squad carried a tripod-mounted [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]].
